form.formComment: Finished third (18.06) at Wanganui Straight last time at big odds, making it four placings in a row. Has a low draw. Expected to measure up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third (18.06) at Wanganui Straight last time at big odds, making it four placings in a row. Has a low draw. Expected to measure up.

form.formComment: Has won five in a row. Good effort to score just four days ago over 295m at Addington by 8 lengths in a Class 1. Yet to taste defeat in five runs and looks hard to top again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has won five in a row. Good effort to score just four days ago over 295m at Addington by 8 lengths in a Class 1. Yet to taste defeat in five runs and looks hard to top again.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, filling the minors at her last four starts, the latest when second (17.29) at Addington. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Decent recent form so demands respect.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Racing well without winning, filling the minors at her last four starts, the latest when second (17.29) at Addington. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Decent recent form so demands respect.

form.formComment: Was in a purple patch of form before proving a little disappointing last start, finishing fourth at Addington over 295m. Likely to struggle this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was in a purple patch of form before proving a little disappointing last start, finishing fourth at Addington over 295m. Likely to struggle this time.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Cambridge Raceway (21.85) in a Class 1/2, finishing a one length third. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and five places from nine starts. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 3rd in a Class 2 on April 10 over 295m at Addington behind Only Nugget beaten 2.5 lengths (17.33). Around the mark recently. Key runner based on recent form.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 1.2 lengths at Manawatu over 375m (21.64) beating Big Time Fern in Class 2 on April 14. Go close.

form.formComment: Out of the placings last time but the run prior she recorded an exceptional 17.26 over 313m finishing second at Wanganui Straight. Can't recommend her in this.
